title: Optimization Exemplar — Interactive Convergence Suite
subtitle: Live gradient-descent diagnostics on the configurable quadratic f(x) = (1/2) x^T A x − b^T x. Defaults read from manuscript/config.yaml; every knob is CLI-overridable.

panels.title: Objective vs iteration (per step size)
panels.description: Stable α (< 2/λ_max(A)) → monotone descent to f(x*). α ≥ stable bound → divergence.

panels.title: Iterations to converge vs α
panels.description: U-shape: too small α → slow (capped at max_iterations); α ≥ 2 → divergence (also capped).

panels.title: Final ||x_T − x*|| vs α
panels.description: Stable region: distance ≪ tol; divergent region: distance grows without bound (clipped on log-y).

panels.title: 1-D objective landscape (slice along x_0)
panels.description: Quadratic landscape with the live gradient-descent trajectory for the dropdown-selected α and slider x_0.

panels.title: Stability diagnostics
panels.description: Bar chart of A's eigenvalues with the stable-step bound 2/λ_max marked.

controls.label: step size α (overlay)
controls.description: overlay this α's trajectory on the landscape

controls.label: x_0 (landscape probe)
controls.description: initial x for the live trajectory overlay

invariants.name: gradient_finite_difference_agreement
invariants.description: max |∇f_analytic − ∇f_finite_diff| < 1e-5 at a random test point (seed=20260506, eps=1e-06)

invariants.name: objective_monotone_alpha=0.01
invariants.witness: worst out-of-order step = 0.000e+00 (tol=1.0e-09, sequence length 1001, expect a_i >= a_{i+1})
invariants.description: objective history is monotone non-increasing for stable α=0.01

invariants.description: every stable step size (α < 2/λ_max) yields a finite final objective (no NaN/Inf); divergent α intentionally not checked

notes: Stable step bound: 2/λ_max(A). Step sizes ≥ this bound are expected to diverge.
Closed-form minimum: x* = A^{-1} b; f(x*) is reported in the hyperparameters block.
